# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injector
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  values: |
    global:
      proxy:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        enableCoreDump: true
        logLevel: debug
        serviceCluster: istio-proxy
      sidecarInjector:
        injectionPath: /inject
        enable: true
      istioCni:
        enabled: true

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: istio-system
---

apiVersion: policy/v1beta1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-admin-interface
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: sidecar-injection
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: <your-app-label>
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 15000
          
---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v1
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: <your-app>
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: <your-deployment>
  minReplicas: 1
  maxReplicas: 10
  targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 80

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: <your-app>
  namespace: <your-namespace>
  labels:
    app: <your-app-label>
spec:
  containers:
    - name: <your-container>
      image: <your-image>
      ports:
        - containerPort: <your-port>
      volumeMounts:
        - name: istio-proxy
          mountPath: /etc/istio/proxy
  volumes:
    - name: istio-proxy
      emptyDir: {}
